name: o10-filelens
description: Shows the file insights in the Explorer tooltip and editor hover

o10-filelens.tokenCount.enabled.description: Show the estimated AI token count and character count in file insights (Explorer tooltip and editor hover).

o10-filelens.tokenCount.charsPerToken.description: Average characters per token used to estimate Claude token counts. Lower values yield higher token estimates.

o10-filelens.tokenCount.maxFileSizeKB.description: Maximum file size (in KB) to read for token estimation. Larger files skip the token count to stay fast.
